query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, uc.clinicaId, c.nome as clinicaNome, c.codigo FROM users u LEFT JOIN userClinicas uc ON u.id = uc.userId LEFT JOIN clinicas c ON uc.clinicaId = c.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Fabiana%' ORDER BY c.codigo;
